languages.text: Себериан одержим Багряной пляской Кхейна, что заставляет его свиту дрожать от страха, а его самого — полагаться лишь на себя.

traits.locale_text: Себериан одержим Кроваворуким-в-ярости, что заставляет его свиту дрожать от страха, а его самого — полагаться лишь на себя.

languages.text: Seberian is possessed by an obsession with the Crimson Dance of Khaine, an obsession that makes his retinue tremble with fear and leaves him reliant upon none but himself.
languages.original_text: Себериан одержим Багряной пляской Кхейна, что заставляет его свиту дрожать от страха, а его самого — полагаться лишь на себя.

traits.locale_text: Seberian is possessed by an obsession with the Crimson Dance of Khaine, an obsession that makes his retinue tremble with fear and leaves him reliant upon none but himself.

Seberian is possessed by an obsession with the Crimson Dance of Khaine, an obsession that makes his retinue tremble with fear and leaves him reliant upon none but himself.

languages.text: Seberian ist vom Blutroten Tanz von Khaine besessen. Da diese Besessenheit sein Gefolge vor Angst erzittern lässt, ist Seberian auf sich gestellt.
languages.original_text: Seberian is possessed by an obsession with the Crimson Dance of Khaine, an obsession that makes his retinue tremble with fear and leaves him reliant upon none but himself.

traits.locale_text: Seberian ist vom Blutroten Tanz von Khaine besessen. Da diese Besessenheit sein Gefolge vor Angst erzittern lässt, ist Seberian auf sich gestellt.

languages.text: Seberian est obnubilé par la Danse écarlate de Khaine, une obsession qui fait trembler de peur son entourage et à cause de laquelle il ne compte que sur lui-même.
languages.original_text: Seberian is possessed by an obsession with the Crimson Dance of Khaine, an obsession that makes his retinue tremble with fear and leaves him reliant upon none but himself.

traits.locale_text: Seberian est obnubilé par la Danse écarlate de Khaine, une obsession qui fait trembler de peur son entourage et à cause de laquelle il ne compte que sur lui-même.

languages.text: 塞贝里安被凯恩的猩红之舞迷了心窍，这种执念让他的随从胆战心惊，也让他除了自己之外谁都不信任。
languages.original_text: Seberian is possessed by an obsession with the Crimson Dance of Khaine, an obsession that makes his retinue tremble with fear and leaves him reliant upon none but himself.

traits.locale_text: 塞贝里安被凯恩的猩红之舞迷了心窍，这种执念让他的随从胆战心惊，也让他除了自己之外谁都不信任。

languages.text: Seberian está poseído por una obsesión con la Danza Carmesí de Khaine, una obsesión que infunde el terror en su séquito y nubla su confianza en nadie que no sea él mismo.
languages.original_text: Seberian is possessed by an obsession with the Crimson Dance of Khaine, an obsession that makes his retinue tremble with fear and leaves him reliant upon none but himself.

traits.locale_text: Seberian está poseído por una obsesión con la Danza Carmesí de Khaine, una obsesión que infunde el terror en su séquito y nubla su confianza en nadie que no sea él mismo.

languages.text: セベリアンはブラッドハンド・フューリーに憑依され、従者を恐怖で震え上がらせ、自分自身だけを頼りにする。
languages.original_text: Seberian is possessed by a Blood-Handed Fury, causing his retinue to tremble with fear and himself to rely only on himself.

languages.text: Seberian, Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı'na saplantılı bir şekilde bağlı. Bu saplantı, maiyetini korkudan titretip onu sadece kendisine güvenmeye itiyor.
